channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lawsuit alleges ex-Fox Sports host Skip Bayless harassed hairstylist, offered her $1.5 million for sex
item.description: The complaint claims Fox executives fostered a hostile work environment that allowed senior managers and on-air personalities including Bayless to abuse workers without fear of punishment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: BC's Stiga scores on OT breakaway to give US 2nd straight world junior title, 4-3 over Finland
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Teddy Stiga scored on a breakaway at 8:04 of 3-on-3 overtime to give the United States a 4-3 victory over Finland on Sunday night in the world junior hockey championship game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lions secure NFC's No. 1 seed, Broncos and Buccaneers clinch the NFL's final two playoff spots
item.description: The road to the Super Bowl in the NFC will go through Motown. The Detroit Lions secured a No. 1 seed with a 31-9 victory over the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sensabaugh stays hot as Jazz beat Orlando, 105-92
item.description: ORLANDO (ABC4 Sports) - So far, 2025 has treated the Utah Jazz pretty well, especially Brice Sensabaugh.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dolphins' frustrated Tyreek Hill appears to indicate he wants out of Miami after loss to Jets
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — A frustrated Tyreek Hill might want out of Miami. The star wide receiver appeared to indicate after the Dolphins' 32-20 loss to the New York Jets on Sunday that he could want to play elsewhere next season.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hideki Matsuyama has record-setting start to the PGA Tour season with victory at Kapalua
item.description: KAPALUA, Hawaii (AP) — Hideki Matsuyama opened the new season with a record performance, though it was hard to tell from his emotions. He was a machine at The Sentry, with 35 holes at birdie or better to finish at 35-under par, both PGA Tour records.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Green has 33 points, VanVleet's late steal helps Rockets hold on for 119-115 win over Lakers
item.description: Jalen Green had 33 points and Fred VanVleet grabbed a key steal late to allow the Houston Rockets to hold on for a 119-115 win over the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lawsuit alleges Fox Sports ex-host harassed hairstylist and offered her $1.5M for sex
item.description: A woman who worked as a hairstylist for Fox Sports alleges in a lawsuit that former on-air host Skip Bayless offered her $1.5 million to have sex with him.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Warriors’ Steve Kerr still in ‘shock’ over Kings’ firing of Mike Brown
item.description: Brown, a member of the Warriors' coaching staff from 2016-22, was fired Dec. 27 midway through his third season with the Kings.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: What the 49ers said after losing to the Cardinals in their season finale
item.description: "It's hard to look the guys in their faces as a leader on the team and that's the product that we keep putting out game after game. It's pretty embarrassing.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, Cam Inman, Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Bucs’ Mike Evans makes NFL history, cashes $3 million incentive with catch on final play of game
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers star receiver Mike Evans needed 85 yards to not just make NFL history but cash in a $3 million contract incentive in Week 18.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nix leads Broncos past Chiefs' reserves 38-0 and into playoffs for 1st time since 2015 season
item.description: The Denver Broncos are back in the playoffs for the first time since winning Super Bowl 50 following the 2015 season.
item.dc:creator: Arnie Stapleton, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New Orleans Saints, NFL to donate $1 million to victims of truck attack
item.description: The relief contributions come after Shamsud-Din Jabbar drove a rented truck into a crowd on New Year’s Day on Bourbon Street, killing 14 people.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Fox Sports captures Saints' moment of silence in first game after deadly terror attack
item.description: Fox Sports captured the somber moment when the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and New Orleans Saints had a moment of silence for those killed in the terror attack on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Steelers' George Pickens argues with fans during loss to Bengals
item.description: Pittsburgh Steelers' embattled wide receiver George Pickens was seen getting into an argument with fans during the team's loss to the Cincinnati Bengals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs' Travis Kelce fined more than $14K for celebration after historic TD: reports
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star Travis Kelce was reportedly fined more than $14,000 for his touchdown celebration against the Pittsburgh Steelers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Runnin' Utes get run over by Texas Tech, 93-65
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It may be a long first season in the Big 12 Conference for the Utes basketball team. Darrion Williams scored 19 points with nine assists, Federiko Federiko added 14 points on 7-of-9 shooting — including five dunks — on Saturday, and Texas Tech beat Utah 93-65.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State holds off Fresno State to improve to 14-1
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State is proving to be the team to beat in the Mountain West Conference this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: US beats Czechia 4-1 to set up world junior hockey final against Finland
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Boston University's Cole Eiserman broke a second-period tie and the defending champion United States beat Czechia 4-1 on Saturday night to advance to the world junior hockey championship game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago Bulls plan to retire Derrick Rose's jersey next season
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Derrick Rose wasn't sure how he will feel when sees his No. 1 hanging from the rafters. He was still trying to process the news. The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday they plan to retire Rose's jersey sometime next season.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ravens QB Jackson, the first member of the 4,000-900 club, looks toward playoff run
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson capped a sensational regular season with a rather ordinary performance. It was still plenty good enough to set a pair of NFL records and lead the Baltimore Ravens to a second straight AFC North title.
item.dc:creator: DAVID GINSBURG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs finally depart KC for Denver amid ice storm after 4 hours spent waiting on the tarmac
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Chiefs finally departed from Kansas City International Airport for their game in Denver on Saturday after spending about four hours stranded on the tarmac amid an ice storm that blanketed the region ahead of an impending blizzard.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Knicks visit conference foe Chicago Saturday
item.description: New York Knicks (24-11, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (15-19, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Knicks -5.5; over/under is 235.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago takes on New York in Eastern Conference action Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers sign star out of Korean baseball league
item.description: If you thought the Los Angeles Dodgers would slow down on player signings because they already assembled a world champion roster, then you were wrong. According to the team on Friday, the Dodgers have added one of this offseason's most sought-after prizes: Korean star second baseman Hyeseong Kim.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Olympic sprinter arrested in Florida on alleged police battery incident: report
item.description: United States sprinter Fred Kerley was arrested in Miami Beach for alleged battery of a law enforcement official, NBC affiliate WTVJ reports.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Verizon to bring Super Bowl FanFest to life in 30 cities, offering NFL championship hype nationwide
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Caesars Superdome may be the epicenter for the Super Bowl in New Orleans next month, but Verizon has a game plan to ensure the championship excitement stretches beyond the Big Easy.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears CB Jaylon Johnson earns team's lone Pro Bowl selection this season, his 2nd straight
item.description: Bears cornerback Jaylon Johnson has been selected to represent the NFC at the 2025 Pro Bowl Games, the NFL announced Thursday morning. The games will be held a week before the Super Bowl, on Sunday, Feb. 2, at Camping World Stadium in Orlando, Fla.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 people.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni set to rest Saquon Barkley in finale and end chance at NFL rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley had a heart-to-heart talk with his dad that was more coated in heartbreak than hope over the Philadelphia Eagles running back's pursuit of the NFL single-season rushing record.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed to Thursday night
item.description: Hours following the New Year's Day tragedy on Bourbon Street, Wednesday's Allstate Sugar Bowl bout between Notre Dame and Georgia is being postponed.
item.dc:creator: Richie Mills, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Westbrook's triple-double leads Denver past Utah
item.description: DENVER (AP) - Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Holiday Classic: Lincoln Stockton 64, Mission Bay 45
item.description: In the American Bracket Championship Game of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Lincoln High School from Stockton, CA defeated Mission Bay 64-45.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 75, Windward 74
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO)-Montgomery playing in the fifth place game on Monday afternoon went to overtime for bonus basketball against Windward and won 75-74. Lead by Senior, JJ Sanchez who poured in 27. While fellow senior Devin Hamilton added 18, and Alek Sanchez, twin of JJ hit for 12.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Blues dominate Blackhawks 6-2 in Discover NHL Winter Classic
item.description: The St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks will close the 2024 calendar year with a head-to-head battle outdoors: The NHL Discover Winter Classic.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Bears wrap up trying 2024 season vs. Packers on Sunday at noon in Green Bay
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the ball left the hand of Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels with no time left on the clock on Oct. 27 in Washington, the Bears were 4-2 and just needed to swat the ball to the ground to finish off their fourth straight win. Instead, the ball was batted into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
